title: Systems and methods for managing device privileges
abstract: Systems and methods (referred to as systems) generate a user privilege profile associated with a device. The user privilege profile may include one or more rules. The systems respond to privilege requests generated by the device and network event information associated with the device. The network event information can be indicative of the device's connection to a local area network (LAN). The systems evaluate the privilege request and the one or more rules to determine whether to grant the requested privileges. The evaluation may grant or deny a privilege request or revoke a privilege grant based on the device's connection to the LAN.
